packages.name: fmt
packages.description: String formatting utilities: padding, alignment, truncation, case conversion, trim, separators, and table helpers
packages.author: OFS Community

packages.name: core
packages.description: Core OFS utilities: math, predicates, range helpers, and integer algorithms
packages.author: OFS Team

packages.name: math
packages.description: Advanced math functions: primes, digit utilities, reverse numbers
packages.author: OFS Team

packages.name: string
packages.description: String utility functions for OFS: repeat, starts_with, is_empty
packages.author: OFS Team

packages.name: io
packages.description: I/O utility functions for OFS: prompt, separators, headers
packages.author: OFS Team

packages.name: webserver
packages.description: HTTP utility helpers for building web applications in OFS
packages.author: OFS Team

packages.name: bedrock
packages.description: Low-level heap cells, regions, and bit-field helpers
packages.author: OFS Team

packages.name: bedrock-packet
packages.description: Packet layout helpers built on bedrock regions
packages.author: OFS Team

packages.name: rift
packages.description: Foreign runtime wrappers and C ABI helpers for OFS
packages.author: OFS Team

packages.name: terminal-colors
packages.description: ANSI terminal color output helpers for OFS
packages.author: OFS Team

packages.name: memory-modes
packages.description: Helpers and documentation for fracture/abyss/fractal memory modes
packages.author: OFS Team

packages.name: test-lib
packages.description: OFS test utilities and helpers for unit testing
packages.author: OFS Team
